changelog.change: · Added photo merging with music when audio is available.
· Fully redesigned the photo picker with a smoother liquid-style UI and smarter photo/video selection.
· Redesigned the download interface with a faster download engine.
· Delivered major UI/UX refinements across the entire tweak.
· Added full compatibility with IG v428 and later.
· Update to version 4.3 before 06/06/2026 — all earlier versions will stop working after that date.
· Updated base IPA to Instagram v428.1

descriptionlist.longdescription:
In App Purchase: $3.99

In-App Settings:
• To open settings, go to the Profile tab and tap the ⚙️ Gear icon next to your Instagram name — or long-press the Home button / Instagram logo.
• Download videos from Posts, IGTV, Reels, and DMs (HD / SD).
• Save images from Posts, Stories, private DMs, and Profiles.
• Save and merge photos with music as Slideshow.
• Block all promo ads in Feed, Stories, and Reels.
• Quick Seen / Unseen toggle for Stories and DMs.
• Ghost Typing mode.
• Disable screenshot prevention in DMs.
• Hide tabs such as Explore, Reels, and Create.
• Keep unsent messages + storing it in logs.
• Icon theme change iOS 18 and earlier.
• Profile analyzer (analyze fully your profile following status).
• Feed Grid & list View.
• Fake location.
• Copy text from Comments, Descriptions, and Bios.
• Add confirmation prompts before liking, commenting, calling, or reposting.
• And many more customization options...
• Supports iPadOS.


IPA & TrollStore Version:
  • Instructions from here...


    • · OR copy this source and add it to ur source list on Altstore, FlekSt0re, Esign etc..
    · https://repo.ikghd.me/repo.json

    Refund Policy:
    · Refund accepted if you encounter issues such as safe mode or the tweak not working.
    · Must provide full details about the issue, including photos & crash logs.
    · Change of mind is not accepted; you can see details with photos & videos before buying.
    · If refund is accepted, processing will take 3 to 7 days.
    · Thank you 🤗 & enjoy!


    Subscription | Key & Devices:
    · subscription valid for (99 days).
    · The key is for 1 device and is transferable.


    Refer to the FAQ page for more info:
  • FAQ page
